caption: A man wearing a silver, cone-shaped wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. In the background, the walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs and merchandise, including clothing items branded with "LEE". An on-screen logo appears in the bottom left and center-right of the frames, featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is seen gesturing with his left hand near his chin and shifting his gaze slightly. He remains seated in the same position, with the camera angle remaining constant as he speaks or reacts during the recording session.
